title: EFS Large Natural Wood Log Slice Tree Bark Wedding Table Centerpiece Cake Stand (XXL 38-47cms)
features: XXL Natural Wood slice 43-47 cm and thickness 3.5 cm
description: The perfect addition to a country themed wedding or outdoors event, capturing the beauty of nature in it's natural form These slices can form the base structure for any centrepiece design, add your own floral touch or martini vase Please note natural products will always have small differences and imperfections Dimensions of this log slice is an approximate depth of 3.5cm and a diameter of 43-47cm. Please remember these are natural products and the measurements will vary.
